greeting: Well hello there, fellow pixel-pusher and code conjurer!
introParagraph: This week, Release Radar tracked 11 releases from 9 brands, bringing a healthy mix of new features, crucial fixes, and thoughtful improvements. While some plugins were busy patching up the digital equivalent of leaky faucets, others were rolling out some genuinely exciting advancements that could change how you build and manage sites.

highlights.title: WPForms Lite 1.10.1
highlights.summary: WPForms just introduced 'Smart Form Editing' with an AI chat interface, letting you modify forms using natural language. Plus, secret key fields are now masked for better privacy — a win for both innovation and security!

highlights.title: WP Simple Pay 4.17.2
highlights.summary: WP Simple Pay steps up its game with robust conditional logic for form fields, allowing dynamic display based on user input. They also added custom CSS options, giving developers more control over styling and user experience.

highlights.title: Easy Digital Downloads 3.6.8
highlights.summary: EDD broadens its payment horizons by adding support for BLIK payments via Stripe, expanding reach for European users. They also squashed a bug with the orders table filter, ensuring smoother admin operations.

highlights.title: WPCode 2.3.6
highlights.summary: WPCode now makes snippet management a breeze by clearly indicating the origin of each library snippet, complete with cloud badges and author attribution. This small tweak is a big win for organization and traceability in your code library.

highlights.title: All in One SEO 4.9.7.2
highlights.summary: AIOSEO tackled a critical race condition that was corrupting cache tables, silently overwriting entries for some users. This fix is crucial for maintaining data integrity and reliable performance on affected sites.

otherReleases.title: MonsterInsights 10.2.2
otherReleases.shortSummary: Fixes: Various bug fixes and updates.

closingJoke: Why did the WordPress developer break up with the plugin? Because it had too many dependencies and wasn't committing enough!
